message:
fix(multi): rune-safe string ops, validate hardening, tmux alias cleanup

Convert all byte-index string slicing to rune-aware slicing to prevent splitting
multi-byte UTF-8 characters. Affected sites:
  - agent/types.go ProfileName capitalization
  - ensemble/contributions.go highlight truncation
  - robot/cass_inject.go session name, markdown line, code snippet, and
    token-budget truncation
  - robot/registry.go and schema.go humanize/description capitalization
  - robot/synthesis.go action line truncation
  - state/runtime_store.go table name validation (simplify boolean expression)

cli/validate: use regularFileExists for palette_file to reject directories,
delegate palette and templates path resolution to the new config.Resolve*
helpers (removing duplicated unsafe-path logic), and add tests for root-palette
fallback and traversal-escape rejection.

templates/loader: replace inline path resolution with config.ResolveProjectTemplatesDir.

tmux/session: remove short aliases (cc, cod, gmi) from agent detection to avoid
false positives with common shell commands; add comment documenting title format.

robot/robot_dashboard: populate AlertSummary.BySeverity and ByType from tracker
Summary() instead of only TotalActive count.

ensemble/session_store_test: extract resetDefaultStateStoreForTest helper that
properly closes the store and includes the mu field, fixing a potential test
flake from stale singleton state.

robot/attention_feed_test: add rotation_started and rotation_failed fallback
agent ID coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1117,22 +1117,22 @@ func TestDetectAgentFromCommandEdgeCases(t *testing.T) {
 		{"claude bare", "claude", AgentClaude},
 		{"claude with args", "claude --model opus", AgentClaude},
 		{"claude path", "/usr/bin/claude", AgentClaude},
-		{"cc alias", "cc", AgentClaude},
-		{"cc with args", "cc --resume", AgentClaude},
+		{"cc alias", "cc", AgentUser},
+		{"cc with args", "cc --resume", AgentUser},
 
 		// Codex variants
 		{"codex bare", "codex", AgentCodex},
 		{"codex with args", "codex --model gpt4o", AgentCodex},
 		{"codex path", "/opt/codex", AgentCodex},
-		{"cod alias", "cod", AgentCodex},
-		{"cod with args", "cod --dangerously-bypass", AgentCodex},
+		{"cod alias", "cod", AgentUser},
+		{"cod with args", "cod --dangerously-bypass", AgentUser},
 
 		// Gemini variants
 		{"gemini bare", "gemini", AgentGemini},
 		{"gemini with args", "gemini --model flash", AgentGemini},
 		{"gemini path", "/bin/gemini", AgentGemini},
-		{"gmi alias", "gmi", AgentGemini},
-		{"gmi with args", "gmi start", AgentGemini},
+		{"gmi alias", "gmi", AgentUser},
+		{"gmi with args", "gmi start", AgentUser},
 
 		// Cursor
 		{"cursor bare", "cursor", AgentCursor},
